name: RDN5_chrXII_cluster
description: 5S ribosomal RNA gene copies embedded in the chrXII RDN1 array. Each ~9.1 kb 35S repeat unit contains one 5S (RDN5) gene transcribed divergently by Pol III in the NTS1/NTS2 region. Copy number tracks the 35S array (~100-200). Sequence-level paralogs to RDN5 exist as solo copies elsewhere but the chrXII array dominates expression.
